events.speaker: AE
events.text: Great to have everyone on. Mark, glad you could join.

events.speaker: Mark O'Brien
events.text: Thanks. I wanted to get a sense of the timeline and what we're committing to.

events.speaker: Sarah Kim
events.text: We're ready to move forward but we need to resolve the data residency question first.

events.speaker: Jen Lee
events.text: Right, that's actually my main concern. We need to understand your GDPR Article 46 compliance posture — specifically around standard contractual clauses and whether you can guarantee Frankfurt region isolation for all our data.

events.speaker: NOTCH_TRIGGER
events.signal_content: GDPR Art. 46 + SCC + Frankfurt region isolation
events.generated_response: We support EU data residency via Frankfurt region isolation — all data stays within the EU. For GDPR Art. 46 compliance, we use Standard Contractual Clauses. We have a pre-signed SCC addendum to our DPA — your legal team typically clears it in under 10 days. We can scope the entire pilot to run within EU infrastructure, no data leaves the region.

events.speaker: Sarah Kim
events.text: That's helpful. Can you send that SCC template after the call?

events.speaker: Mark O'Brien
events.text: What's the timeline if we want to be live by end of Q3?

events.speaker: NOTCH_TRIGGER
events.signal_content: Pilot success definition still not closed

events.speaker: AE
events.text: Great question — let's define what a successful 30-day pilot looks like so we're aligned before we talk timeline.

events.speaker: Sarah Kim
events.text: Budget is approved at $180k ceiling — we just need legal and IT sign-off.
